name: gitwarp
description: Agent Skill and CLI for isolated Git worktrees, dispatch, context, and handoff dossiers.

interface.shortDescription: Isolated Git worktrees and handoff dossiers for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Use GitWarp as a standard Agent Skill plus CLI to create isolated git worktree sandboxes, switch into existing sandboxes, inspect dossiers, hand off progress, audit state, and finish safely.
defaultPrompt: Run gitwarp statusline for a compact context anchor and gitwarp enter when full dossier context is needed.
For new isolated work, prefer gitwarp task create; use gitwarp create --role base only for long-lived user feature branches, and gitwarp switch for existing sandboxes.
Inside a sandbox, inspect context and read task.md, progress.md, and lessons.md before editing.
